heading_content_part: Photo,Video Locker – CalculatorSkip to contentPhoto,Video Locker – CalculatorPRIVACY POLICYThis Privacy Policy applies to the “Photo, Video Locker – Calculator” mobile app for Android under the publisher name of “Photo and video applications”. We are committed to protecting the privacy of all visitors, users and others who access our application. By accessing or using our Service, you signify that you have read, understood and agree to our collection, storage, use and disclosure of your

personal information as described in this Privacy Policy. Please take a moment to familiarize yourself with our privacy practices and let us know if you have any questions.PERSONAL INFORMATIONYour personal information is not collected because we do not store data online while you hide pictures and videos using our app.

heading_content_part: Our App uses Device Administrator permission. For the protection from the app uninstallation by snoopers or children, We recommended to enable Device Admin permission from our Settings. We called it Uninstall Protection.

Our App uses Accessibility Service. You can enable Power Saving mode from our Settings to save battery power and have Eco-friendly applock. We use this accessibility service for the read app lock for the people with disabilities. Please be assured that We never collect any other data from accessibility.We do not store files online. Those are stored locally in your device.
